utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Each item requires a description and costs (with total_budget needing a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). In the plan: health_coverage includes description and cost; property_coverage includes description and cost; travel_coverage includes description and cost; additional_services includes description and cost; total_budget includes monthly and annual cost breakdown (and an extra field for monthly_savings, which is acceptable). Therefore, all items are present and fully specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan mentions: EliteCare Physical Health and EliteCare Mental Health within a Comprehensive Health Package; EliteHome Premium Coverage for property; and EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel; plus a Preventive Care Package. From the ground-truth ratings, these correspond to: EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health) with rating 10; EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health) with rating 10; EliteHome Premium Coverage with rating 10; EliteTravel Premium Plan with rating 10; and Preventive Care Package with rating 8.
